name: Navigation
descriptionTemplate: When commanding a naval unit to attack, there is X% chance that one of the surrounding inactive naval unit will participate in the attack.(Only once per turn)

descriptionTemplateFr: When commanding a naval unité to attaque, there is X% chance that one of the surrounding inactive naval unité will participate in the attaque.(Only once par tour)
longDesc: Compétence spécifique à un général. « Navigation » monte jusqu'au niveau 5. Au niveau maximum (5), elle applique l'effet suivant : « When commanding a naval unité to attaque, there is 100% chance that one of the surrounding inactive naval unité will participate in the attaque.(Only once par tour) ». Signature propre à un général : son niveau maximum conditionne la valorisation de la carte.
longDescEn: A general-specific skill. "Navigation" scales up to level 5. At max level (5), the skill applies the following effect: "When commanding a naval unit to attack, there is 100% chance that one of the surrounding inactive naval unit will participate in the attack.(Only once per turn)". A general-specific signature: its max level drives the card's overall value.
longDescDe: Eine generalspezifische Fähigkeit. „Navigation“ skaliert bis Stufe 5. Auf Maximalstufe (5) wirkt folgender Effekt: „When commanding a naval unit to attack, there is 100% chance that one of the surrounding inactive naval unit will participate in the attack.(Only once per turn)“. Eine generalspezifische Signatur: Ihr Maximallevel bestimmt den Gesamtwert der Karte.
